items.title_en: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
items.title_zh: IPO后不到两周，SpaceX通过发债筹集了250亿美元
items.desc_en: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士称，在接到价值近 900 亿美元的订单后，SpaceX 通过发债筹集了 250 亿美元。

items.title_en: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员预计，马姆达尼支持的候选人可能会在纽约市初选中获胜
items.desc_en: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.
items.desc_zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

items.title_en: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks are falling in response
items.title_zh: Meta 正在构建一个预测市场应用程序。这些股票纷纷下跌
items.desc_en: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."
items.desc_zh: 报道称，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格指示员工开发一个预测市场平台，内部称为“Arena”。

items.title_en: PGA Tour CEO Brian Rolapp unveils sweeping changes to professional golf
items.title_zh: 美巡赛首席执行官布莱恩·罗拉普 (Brian Rolapp) 公布了职业高尔夫的彻底变革
items.desc_en: Changes to the PGA Tour are designed to elevate competition and raise payouts for winners.
items.desc_zh: 美巡赛的变化旨在提升竞争并提高获胜者的奖金。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: France records hottest-ever night as 40 drown trying to escape heatwave - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 法国创下史上最热夜晚 40人因躲避热浪而溺水身亡
items.desc_en: France records hottest-ever night as 40 drown trying to escape heatwave  Al Jazeera40 people drown as France seeks relief from record heat  The Washington PostEiffel Tower shuts as France faces hottes
items.desc_zh: 法国创下有史以来最热夜晚，40 人在试图躲避热浪时溺水

items.title_en: SpaceX could remain under pressure as more insiders gain permission to sell. Here are the key dates
items.title_zh: 随着更多内部人士获得出售许可，SpaceX 可能仍面临压力。以下是关键日期
items.desc_en: Investors can expect a significant wave of supply to hit the market that will likely drive the price down, with each new lockup expiration period.
items.desc_zh: 投资者可以预期，随着每个新的锁定期到期，市场上将出现大量供应，这可能会导致价格下跌。

items.title_en: Inside Kevin Warsh's selection process for the next Atlanta Fed president
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 遴选下一任亚特兰大联储主席的过程
items.desc_en: Choosing a new head for the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta is an opportunity for new Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh to reshape the central bank.
items.desc_zh: 为亚特兰大联储选择新行长是新任美联储主席凯文·沃什重塑央行的一个机会。

items.title_en: Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan to begin for ships stranded in Persian Gulf, maritime organization says
items.title_zh: 海事组织表示，霍尔木兹海峡计划开始疏散滞留在波斯湾的船只
items.desc_en: More than 11,000 seafarers stuck in the Persian Gulf will begin to exit through the Hormuz Strait in a large-scale evacuation plan backed by Iran and the U.S.
items.desc_zh: 在伊朗和美国支持的大规模疏散计划中，滞留在波斯湾的 11,000 多名海员将开始通过霍尔木兹海峡撤离。

items.title_en: Trump administration can expand fast-track deportation process, US appeals court rules - Reuters

items.title_zh: 勒索信声称南希·格思里在绑架后死亡 - BBC

items.desc_zh: 据报道，勒索信声称南希·格思里 (Nancy Guthrie) 被绑架后死亡 据报道，有关南希·格思里 (Nancy Guthrie) 失踪的赎金信称她已死亡

items.title_en: 18-year-old suspect in custody after Chico library shooting, police say - KRCR
items.title_zh: 警方称，奇科图书馆枪击事件后，18 岁嫌疑人已被拘留 - KRCR
items.desc_en: 18-year-old suspect in custody after Chico library shooting, police say  KRCR2 killed, child injured in shooting at Butte County Library in Chico, police say  KCRA18-year-old suspect arrested in shoot
items.desc_zh: 奇科图书馆枪击事件后，18 岁嫌疑人被拘留，警方称 KRCR2 在奇科巴特县图书馆枪击事件中死亡，儿童受伤，警方称 KCRA 18 岁嫌疑人在枪击事件中被捕

items.title_en: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.title_zh: 当局称，以色列军队在战斗平息后在黎巴嫩南部打死两人
items.desc_en: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方称这两人是真主党特工，但伊朗支持的组织指责其违反停火协议。

items.title_en: Could there be a $10 trillion company? Tech investing star Laffont thinks so
items.title_zh: 会有一家价值10万亿美元的公司吗？科技投资明星拉丰特也这么认为
items.desc_en: A new regime of trillion-dollar companies is replacing the 'Magnificent Seven.'
items.desc_zh: 一个由价值数万亿美元的公司组成的新政权正在取代“七巨头”。

items.title_en: Trump administration can't block SNAP recipients in 5 states from buying soda and candy, judge rules - CBS News
items.title_zh: 法官裁定，特朗普政府无法阻止 5 个州的 SNAP 领取者购买苏打水和糖果 - CBS 新闻

items.title_en: US top court says Rastafarian man cannot sue prison guards who cut his dreadlocks
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院称拉斯特法里男子不能起诉剪掉他辫子的狱警
items.desc_en: The Rastafarian man argued his religious rights were violated after prison officials focibly shaved off his hair.
items.desc_zh: 这名拉斯特法里教男子辩称，监狱官员强行剃掉他的头发后，他的宗教权利受到侵犯。

items.title_en: Afghan Taliban hold first, closed-door talks with EU on deportations - AP News
items.title_zh: 阿富汗塔利班与欧盟就驱逐问题举行首次闭门会谈 - 美联社新闻

items.title_en: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.title_zh: 美伊达成协议后数十艘船只驶过霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
items.desc_zh: 自美国和伊朗签署旨在结束战争的协议以来，该水道的交通量有所增加，仅周六就有 42 艘船只。

items.title_en: Progressive Brad Lander’s surging bid for Congress splinters Democrats' labor union alliance
items.title_zh: 进步派布拉德·兰德(Brad Lander)大幅竞选国会议员导致民主党工会联盟分裂
items.desc_en: Rep. Dan Goldman, D-N.Y., is fighting for his political life in a race with Brad Lander, who is backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani and Sen. Bernie Sanders, I-Vt.
items.desc_zh: 纽约州民主党众议员丹·戈德曼 (Dan Goldman) 正在与布拉德·兰德 (Brad Lander) 争夺政治生命，后者得到了市长佐兰·马姆达尼 (Zohran Mamdani) 和佛蒙特州参议员伯尼·桑德斯 (Bernie Sanders) 的支持。

items.title_en: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
items.title_zh: 标准普尔表示，六月份工厂裁员接近金融危机和新冠疫情水平
items.desc_en: Though the firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June, it came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该公司 6 月份的制造业指数好于预期，但主要来自库存重建和大幅裁员。

items.title_en: Sen. Cassidy plans to push 'big idea' for Social Security reform in last days in office
items.title_zh: 参议员卡西迪计划在任期的最后几天推动社会保障改革的“伟大想法”
items.desc_en: As Social Security faces an imminent funding shortfall, Sen. Bill Cassidy said he has come up with a plan to invest in the stock market on the program's behalf.
items.desc_zh: 由于社会保障面临迫在眉睫的资金短缺，参议员比尔·卡西迪表示，他已提出代表该计划投资股市的计划。

items.title_en: Irish government to contribute £197m to cross-border rail services
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰政府将捐助1.97亿英镑用于跨境铁路服务

items.desc_zh: 这笔钱将来自爱尔兰政府共享岛屿基金的最后拨款。

items.title_zh: 扎克伯格不断推动可穿戴设备，Meta 宣布新款智能眼镜起价 299 美元
items.desc_en: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.
items.desc_zh: Meta 高管表示，他们认为这款轻型智能眼镜是迈向更先进设备（镜片中带有屏幕）的一步。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_en: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
items.title_zh: 联合国调查委员会称以色列故意针对儿童在加沙实施种族灭绝

items.desc_zh: 以色列拒绝接受三人专家小组的新报告，称其为“诽谤性的骗局”。

items.title_en: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇热浪高峰，法国溺水死亡人数激增
items.desc_en: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.
items.desc_zh: 法国总理塞巴斯蒂安·勒科尔努表示，自上周四以来，法国已有 40 人因热浪而溺水身亡。

items.title_en: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
items.title_zh: 特朗普预计新领导人领导下与哥伦比亚关系会更好

items.desc_zh: 初步结果显示，阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉将成为哥伦比亚下一任总统，他得到了特朗普的支持。

items.title_en: Spider which uses spring trap to capture prey discovered in Australia

items.desc_en: Researchers say their hunting method - which allows them to prey on dangerous ants - is unprecedented.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员表示，它们的狩猎方法——这使得它们能够捕食危险的蚂蚁——是前所未有的。

items.title_zh: 随着纽约竞选成为焦点，周二初选有五件事值得关注
items.desc_en: Tuesday’s primaries in New York, Maryland and Utah test outside money, party power and the influence of Zohran Mamdani and Donald Trump.

items.title_en: Montreal shooting leaves officer, civilian and suspect dead
items.title_zh: 蒙特利尔枪击事件造成警官、平民和嫌疑人死亡
items.desc_en: It was the first time in 24 years that a Montreal police officer was  killed in the line of duty, the city's police chief said.
items.desc_zh: 蒙特利尔市警察局长表示，这是 24 年来首次有一名警察在执行任务时被杀。

items.title_en: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
items.title_zh: 勒索信声称南希·格思里在绑架后死亡
items.desc_en: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，可能的绑架者在信中表示，他们并不是故意要她死，并向家人道歉。

items.title_en: Dettol apologises after ad to clean up 'toxic men' backfires in China
items.title_zh: 滴露清理“毒男”广告在中国适得其反后道歉
items.desc_en: The ad sparked accusations of sexism in China, after featuring a man looking for a partner who is "not tainted by other men".
items.desc_zh: 这则广告在中国引发了性别歧视的指责，广告中一名男子正在寻找“不受其他男人玷污”的伴侣。

items.title_en: Inquiry ordered after building fire kills 15 in north India city
items.title_zh: 印度北部城市建筑起火造成15人死亡后下令进行调查
items.desc_en: Witnesses described people jumping from windows to escape, while rescue teams broke through a wall to save lives.
items.desc_zh: 目击者称，人们从窗户跳下逃生，而救援队则冲破墙壁拯救生命。

items.title_en: What to know about a cold storage warehouse fire in Los Angeles - NPR
items.title_zh: 关于洛杉矶冷藏仓库火灾的知识 - NPR
items.desc_en: What to know about a cold storage warehouse fire in Los Angeles  NPRHealth concerns mount as Boyle Heights warehouse fire stretches into a week  Los Angeles TimesLA warehouse fire continues to burn as
items.desc_zh: 关于洛杉矶冷藏仓库火灾的信息 随着博伊尔高地仓库火灾持续一周，NPRHealth 的担忧日益加剧 洛杉矶 TimesLA 仓库火灾继续燃烧

items.title_en: Iran says no new commitments on nuclear sites after Vance says inspectors to be invited back
items.title_zh: 万斯表示将邀请检查员回来后，伊朗表示没有对核设施做出新的承诺
items.desc_en: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗外交部表示，在瑞士会谈后，伊朗“没有就核检查做出新的承诺”。

items.title_en: How 100 hospitals switched to pen and paper to defeat a national cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.title_en: Do you know your 'sweat score'? The rise of hydration tech
items.title_zh: 你知道你的“汗水分数”吗？补水技术的兴起
items.desc_en: Hydration tracking gadgets are flooding the market but is it too much information?
items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导

items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_en: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
items.title_zh: 联合国称缅甸军队在六个月内杀害了700多名平民
items.desc_en: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.
items.desc_zh: 联合国新报告称，去年六个月内有 702 名平民死亡，其中包括 153 名儿童。

items.title_en: It's not just about nudity warns actress - the complex reality of images and online abuse
items.title_zh: 女演员警告说，这不仅仅是裸体问题 - 图像和网络虐待的复杂现实
items.desc_en: Tech companies and authorities are failing women by focusing on nudity rather than consent, says a report by Chayn.
items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。

items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来
items.desc_en: The Nex Playground will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
items.desc_zh: Nex Playground 将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。

items.desc_zh: 喜马拉雅山的村庄正在建造人工冰川，以保证春季农作物的用水。
